subcodes.first_line: The showers of divine mercy are pouring down, and the verses are in every moment being sent down from the Supreme Pen, and the Truth itself hath been made manifest [3.5s]... ...The divines of Persia committed that which no people amongst the peoples of the world hath committed
subcodes.first_line_orig: امطار رحمت رحمانی هاطل و آیات در کل حین از قلم اعلی نازل و نفسه الحق ظاهر شده
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @chastisement and requital, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
